path_warning: Tip: Avoid using the following illegal characters: ? * < > | " and control characters (such as newline, tab, etc.).
instructions_content:
Instructions:

1. Select video file: Supports MP4, AVI, MOV, MKV, FLV, WMV formats
2. Set output directory: It is recommended to use an empty folder to store extraction results
3. 【Path Requirements】The path should not contain illegal characters such as ? * < > | " or spaces and control characters (like newline).
4. Set frame range:
   - Start frame: Frame number starting from 0
   - End frame: Not exceeding total frames - 1
5. Click "Start Processing" to extract
6. You can click "Stop Processing" at any time to interrupt the operation

The extracted images will be saved according to the following rules:
- Automatically create subdirectories every 5000 frames (Part1, Part2...)
- Images are named frame_0000001.jpg format
- Processing logs are recorded in extraction_log.txt (summarized by Part)

【Large File Handling】
- If the number of frames to be extracted (end - start + 1) exceeds 499,999 frames, the program will refuse to process. Please narrow the extraction range.
- If the extraction count is between 50,000 and 499,999, you will be prompted to check the available disk space. You may choose to continue or cancel.
- Please do not close the window or modify the output directory during processing to avoid data corruption.
precautions_content:
Precautions:

【Path Requirements】
1. The path must avoid using ? * < > | " and control characters (like newline, carriage return, tab)
2. It is recommended to use pure English paths to avoid potential compatibility issues, but it is not mandatory

【File Handling】
1. Please ensure the output directory has enough storage space (at least 5 times the size of the video file is recommended)
2. Do not modify files in the output directory during processing
3. Large file extraction (over 50,000 frames) may take a long time; please be patient
4. Extraction exceeding 500,000 frames will be rejected to prevent system resource exhaustion

【Performance】
1. Processing time depends on video length and computer performance

【Other Limitations】
1. Encrypted/DRM-protected videos are not supported
2. Frame positioning accuracy depends on the video encoding format
3. If errors occur, check the log file (extraction_errors.txt, generated only when errors occur)

Version information: v7.5 | ShuoDev
confirm_stop: Are you sure you want to stop processing?
invalid_frames: Invalid frame range! Please ensure the start frame is between 0 and {0}, and start frame <= end frame
invalid_numbers: Please enter a valid frame number (integer)
large_file_warning:
You are about to extract {0} frames, which is a large number. It is recommended to check the available disk space in the output directory to ensure at least {1} GB free space, otherwise processing may fail.

Do you want to continue?
huge_file_error:
Too many frames to extract ({0}), exceeding the limit of 499,999 frames. The program cannot handle this.
Please narrow the extraction range (adjust start and end frames) and try again.
corrupt_video_error:
The video may be corrupted: 50 consecutive frames failed to read, processing stopped.
Successfully saved {0} frames.
Please check the video file or try another tool.
about_description: An open-source video frame extraction tool built for professionals
